center.name: 雅鲁藏布江
center.summary: 雅鲁藏布江是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括藏䴓，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The species has also been observed in Kunming, Yunnan, in far southwestern China, where it most likely migrates to overwinter. In Tibet, the species has been found in the northeastern Tibet Autonomous Region in the Chamdo Prefecture; and in the southeast of the region in Tse (in December) and in Dzeng (in April), both in the South Tibet (Tsangpo) Valley region
